fields.description: If enabled, creates an Employee Checkin with a blank employee link when the device PIN does not match any employee's Attendance Device ID
fields.label: Create Check-in for Unknown Employees

fields.description: Commands older than this many days are automatically closed
fields.label: Force Close After (Days)

fields.description: Log all device communications to Attendance Device Log (for debugging). Disabled by default to avoid DB bloat.
fields.label: Enable Device Log

fields.description: Configure your biometric devices to push data to these URLs
fields.label: Device Endpoint URLs

fields.description: Enter this as the Server Address in your ZKTeco device (ADMS / Cloud Server settings). When the HTTP listener is enabled, additional plain-HTTP addresses are shown.
fields.label: ZKTeco Server Address

fields.description: Enter this as the push server URL in your EBKN device settings. When the HTTP listener is enabled, plain-HTTP alternatives are shown.
fields.label: EBKN Server Address

fields.description: Copy this configuration block and paste it into your Nginx config, then run: sudo service nginx reload
fields.label: Generated Nginx Config

fields.description: Biometric devices use plain HTTP. If your Frappe server uses HTTPS (e.g. Frappe Cloud), devices need a local reverse proxy.
fields.label: On Premises HTTP Listener
